Co Pilot Security
Version: 3.0.50
Build Name: GUARDS DATA LAYOUT FIX
Date: 2026-06-25

Summary:
- Built from v3.0.49 Guards Command Center.
- Fixed selected guard detail rail data so phone/email fields come from the selected guard record only.
- Added guard contact safeguards to avoid showing an obviously mismatched generic guard email under another guard.
- Tightened online detection so approved/on-duty account state is not treated as live online by itself.
- Improved GPS labels: Live now, Online saved GPS, or GPS stale instead of misleading stale timestamps.
- Removed ugly horizontal table overflow and fixed the action column cutoff.
- Shortened filter labels so they fit cleanly.
- Compact right rail layout so Message / View Route / Assign Patrol / View Profile stay visible.
- No new SQL required.

Badge:
v3.0.50 GUARDS DATA LAYOUT FIX

SQL:
No new SQL required.
